description: Feature importance and weight evolution over time. Tracks how each scoring component correlates with winning trades and how the adaptive weight system responds.

trend.interpretation: Strong predictor. Trend alignment is the most reliable signal -- price above 20 EMA and 50 EMA strongly predicts positive outcomes.

momentum.interpretation: Good predictor. 5-day and 20-day return momentum separates winners from losers reliably.

breakout.interpretation: Good predictor. Near-20-day-high stocks have higher win rates, especially in TREND_UP regime.

volume.interpretation: Moderate predictor. Volume confirmation matters but has diminishing returns above 2x average.

news.interpretation: Moderate predictor. News catalyst is binary (100 or 0) but when present, boosts win probability significantly.

volatility.interpretation: Weak predictor. ATR sweet spot (0.8%-4.5%) filters out bad candidates but does not strongly differentiate among remaining ones.

gap.interpretation: Moderate predictor. Gap-up 0.5%-3% is a strong signal when combined with volume. Standalone predictive power is limited.

stoch.interpretation: Weak predictor. Stochastic oscillator adds marginal value. Overbought readings (>80) are not reliably bearish for momentum stocks.

bbands.interpretation: Weak predictor. Bollinger band position is somewhat useful for filtering extremes but not for ranking.

sentiment.interpretation: Very weak predictor. Sentiment scoring from news headlines is noisy. Consider improving NLP model or weighting down.

liquidity.interpretation: Very weak predictor. Liquidity acts as a filter (minimum volume threshold) rather than a predictor -- most scored stocks pass the threshold.

feature_interaction_effects.notes: Highest win-rate combination. All three scores > 80 is the ideal setup.
Strong combination but smaller sample size. Most effective in TREND_UP regime.
Momentum without breakout confirmation is mediocre. Consider requiring breakout > 60.

feature_interaction_effects.description: Breakout alone (no momentum or volume confirmation)
feature_interaction_effects.notes: False breakouts are common without volume/momentum. Never trade breakout in isolation.

recommended_weight_adjustments.reason: Highest correlation with wins (0.42). Consistent outperformance across all regimes.
Lowest information value (0.06). NLP-derived sentiment adds noise. Reduce until model improves.
Moderate correlation (0.22) but underweighted relative to predictive power in GAP-AND-GO setups.
